title: 2024 AMC 10B Problems/Problem 2
solution: $10! = 10 \cdot 9 \cdot 8 \cdot 7! = 720 \cdot 7!$ $6! \cdot 7! = 720 \cdot 7!$ Therefore, the equation is equal to $720 \cdot 7! - 720 \cdot 7! = \boxed{\textbf{(B) }0}$ [ONLY FOR CERTAIN CHINESE TESTPAPERS] $0 - 5! = \boxed{\textbf{(A) }-120}$ ~Aray10 (Main Solution) and RULE101 (Modifications for certain China test papers)
